rulings.Case Title: KENNETH THORNTON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT KOPPL PIPELINE SERVICES, INC. AMENDED MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Off Calendar, per moving party. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MARY RUTH LADD VS. PLANKTOS INC A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT PLANKTOS INC., D2FUSION INC., SOLAR ENERGY LTD, and, NELSON SKALBANIA Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel. Motion is granted. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA ISABEL ORTEGA PEREZ VS. SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Failure to plead facts demonstrating or excusing compliance with the claim presentation requirement may be raised on a general demurrer for failure to state a cause of action. State vs. Superior Court (2004) 32 Cal.4th 1234. Ambiguity created by checking both boxes under Section 9 of the Judicial Counsel Form Complaint. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CHERYL WOODIE VS. CITY COLLEGE OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT Motion To Bifurcate. Granted, pursuant to stipulation. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: THOMPSON PACIFIC CORPORATION VS. JAMESTOWN EQUITY PARTNERS, LLC et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT CITICORP USA, INC. Motion To Expunge Amended Notice Of Pendency Of Action (Lis Pendens). Continued to September 9, 2009, per agreement of parties. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID G MENDEZ VS. BIPINCHANDRA R NAIK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File An Amended Complaint And An Amended Answer To The X-Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 6, PLAINTIFF DAVID MENDEZ Motion For Leave to File an Amended Complaint and an Amended Answer to the Cross-Complaint. Motion denied without prejudice. Counsel's motion and declaration does not comply with CRC 3.1324. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO MOLINAR VS. MARCIA BROWNE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT MARCIA BROWNE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Granted. No opposition filed. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY MULLINS VS. FOREIGN TRADE ZONE 3, INC., A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 9, DEFENDANT THEODORE CAMPBELL DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled, ten days leave to answer. Factual issues not resolved by demurrer. Campbell must allege workers compensation as an affirmative defense. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (Ccp 1094.5)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 13, PETITIONER SETH PAGE Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (CCP 1094.5). Is denied, without prejudice. Plaintiff fails to provide a proof of service, demonstrate that the responding agency was named and served, and there is no administrative record. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK et al VS. JOSE HERNANDEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT SERGIO CHAVEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with five days leave to amend to plead that the premises is exempt from the just cause provisions of the San Francisco Administrative Code. See Wheeler vs. Bainbridge (1948) 84 Cal.App.2nd Supp. 849, 850; Gross vs. Superior Court (1985) 171 Cal.App. 3rd 265, 274-275. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT CARLEVARIS VS. LESLIE CORWIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 24, 2009, line 14, DEFENDANT LESLIE CORWIN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled, five days leave to answer. The request for payment pursuant to a Code of Civil Procedure section 1161(2) notice is distinct from monthly rental payments. =(302/CWW)
